component.name: KWazzup
component.summary: An unofficial WhatsApp client for KDE Plasma

description.p: KWazzup is an unofficial, community-maintained KDE Plasma client for WhatsApp Web. It wraps WhatsApp Web inside a Qt WebEngine view and integrates deeply with the KDE ecosystem.
KWazzup is not affiliated with or endorsed by WhatsApp LLC or Meta Platforms, Inc. WhatsApp is a trademark of WhatsApp LLC.

ul.li: Native KDE notifications with sound via KNotification
Plasma system tray with unread badge (KStatusNotifierItem)
Automatic light/dark theme switching following the system colour scheme
Application lock with optional KWallet integration
Persistent session — stay logged in across restarts
